data.name: Eleanor in Miami: Chains of depravity
data.detailed_description:
The ultimate chapter is here!

We're thrilled to present CHAINS OF DEPRAVITY, the climactic final expansion that completes Eleanor in Miami. This isn't just an update - it's the unforgettable farewell to Eleanor's journey, plunging deeper into her most uninhibited, hedonistic desires. Prepare for intense new content packed with humiliation, indulgence, submission, and raw, boundary-pushing passion - exactly what Eleanor has craved... and what you've been waiting for.

Exclusive New Scenes

  • Kneel before Mr. Banks, Drake's most demanding client, to seal the deal with total obedience.

  • Face Senka's revenge - under her commanding supervision as a ruthless female pimp, service every man in the club... right in the public restroom.

  • Explore the darkest paths in an expanded Theodore's dungeon ending, featuring the twisted Monsieur DuBois and his gimp.

  • Enjoy 4 brand-new sex scenes with Bogdan (VIP casino room & park) and Senka (photo studio & beach).

Massive Game-Wide Overhaul

We're not stopping at new content. The entire game, base version + all previous expansions, is getting a stunning visual upgrade powered by our latest rendering tech (surpassing even French Confessions):

  • Enhanced static images - Every scene rebuilt with 50% more detail: ultra-realistic skin textures, advanced lighting, lifelike hair, and premium materials.

  • Re-rendered animations - All sequences reconstructed from scratch for unmatched smoothness and realism.

  • Fully animated finales - The most explosive climaxes (facial, breast, body) now come alive with breathtaking animation. Every ending feels epic.

Background story

Eleanor felt the suffocating weight of her past pressed down on her shoulders, and she sank further into her chair as she begged Drake to leave this place to start fresh in Florida. When she told him about Kevin and how he had been using her for months, Drake's expression shifted from shock to profound sadness. His hands trembled as he thought about possibly breaking up their marriage. But in the end, Drake couldn't bear the idea of not having Eleanor, and he chose to forgive her.

Eleanor's addiction to the thrill of meaningless sex had pushed her husband, Drake, to a breaking point. In a desperate attempt to save their marriage, they agreed to a rather unconventional solution - Eleanor would be allowed to sleep with other people if it was in the presence of her husband. The same rule was designed for Drake. For Eleanor, this seemed like the perfect compromise; she would get the thrill of illicit sex without actually cheating on her husband.

They moved into a small apartment and began their next step together. Eleanor promised Drake she would stay faithful, yet she still fought with temptation daily and wondered what dirty secret she could keep hidden if he weren't watching closely. She got a job at Faith's beauty salon, where she formed tight bonds with other girls without any of them knowing each other's stories.

Additional Features

Machine-translated languages added - check if your preferred language is supported for a more immersive experience in your native tongue.

  • Chinese simplified

  • French

  • German

  • Italian

  • Polish

  • Portuguese

  • Russian

  • Spanish

  • Turkish

Key features

  • desirable characters known from our previous games

  • kinky story with plenty of hot scenes without any censorship

  • ultra-sharp and vivid 2560 × 1440 px visuals (updated)

  • all new sex scenes animations presented from various angles, with fluid body movement and never-before-seen dynamics

  • non-linear choices and 9 endings to discover

  • for trophy hunters - sex scenes and endings gallery to unlock

data.short_description: Final update to the Eleanor's Miami adventure - mix of visual novel, dating simularion and kinky adventure game with 9 different endings and dozens of hot scenes to discover.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 簡體中文, 土耳其文

  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz+

  • 顯示卡: Graphic card with at least 256 MB
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
